components.name: clojure
components.description: Clojure core environment and runtime library.

components.name: core.async
components.description: Facilities for async programming and communication in Clojure

components.name: tools.analyzer
components.description: An analyzer for Clojure code, written in Clojure and producing AST in EDN

components.name: asm
components.description: ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

components.name: core.match
components.description: Optimized pattern matching and predicate dispatch for Clojure

components.name: java.jdbc
components.description: Parent POM for projects contributed to Clojure

components.name: math.combinatorics
components.description: Efficient, functional algorithms for generating lazy sequences for common combinatorial functions.

components.name: tools.namespace
components.description: Parent POM for projects contributed to Clojure

components.name: java.classpath
components.description: Parent POM for projects contributed to Clojure

components.name: tools.nrepl
components.description: Parent POM for projects contributed to Clojure

components.name: jackson-core
components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

components.name: jackson-dataformat-smile
components.description: Support for reading and writing Smile ("binary JSON") encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

components.name: jackson-dataformat-cbor
components.description: Support for reading and writing Concise Binary Object Representation ([CBOR](https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc7049) encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

components.name: commons-compress
components.description: Apache Commons Compress defines an API for working with compression and archive formats. These include bzip2, gzip, pack200, LZMA, XZ, Snappy, traditional Unix Compress, DEFLATE, DEFLATE64, LZ4, Brotli, Zstandard and ar, cpio, jar, tar, zip, dump, 7z, arj.

components.name: commons-logging
components.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

components.name: httpmime
components.description: Apache HttpComponents HttpClient - MIME coded entities

components.name: commons-codec
components.description: The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoders and decoders for formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

components.name: joda-time
components.description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

components.name: java.data
components.description: Utilities for working with Java beans from Clojure

components.name: commons-io
components.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

components.name: metrics-core
components.description: Metrics is a Java library which gives you unparalleled insight into what your code does in production. Metrics provides a powerful toolkit of ways to measure the behavior of critical components in your production environment.

components.name: logstash-logback-encoder
components.description: Provides logback encoders, layouts, and appenders to log in JSON and other formats supported by Jackson

components.name: commons-lang3
components.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang. The code is tested using the latest revision of the JDK for supported LTS releases: 8, 11, 17, 21 and 25 currently. See https://github.com/apache/commons-lang/blob/master/.github/workflows/maven.yml Please ensure your build environment is up-to-date and kindly report any build issues.

components.name: libintl
components.description: The libintl Library for accessing GNU Gettext Java bundles

components.name: ini4j
components.description: Java API for handling configuration files in Windows .ini format. The library includes its own Map based API, Java Preferences API and Java Beans API for handling .ini files. Additionally, the library includes a feature rich (variable/macro substitution, multiply property values, etc) java.util.Properties replacement.

components.name: dynapath
components.description: An abstraction for modifiable/readable class loaders.

components.name: config
components.description: configuration library for JVM languages using HOCON files

components.name: junixsocket-core
components.description: The core system dependency; the one you want to add to your project

components.name: junixsocket-native-common
components.description: Binaries of the native JNI library for common platforms

components.name: junixsocket-common
components.description: junixsocket is a Java/JNI library that allows the use of Unix Domain Sockets (AF_UNIX sockets) and other socket types, such as AF_TIPC and AF_VSOCK, from Java, using the standard Socket API

components.name: java.jmx
components.description: Produce and consume JMX beans from Clojure.

components.name: metrics-graphite
components.description: A reporter for Metrics which announces measurements to a Graphite server.

components.name: jolokia-core
components.description: jar file containing servlet and helper classes

components.name: json-simple
components.description: A simple Java toolkit for JSON

components.name: javax.servlet-api
components.description: Java.net - The Source for Java Technology Collaboration

components.name: checker-qual
components.description: checker-qual contains annotations (type qualifiers) that a programmerwrites to specify Java code for type-checking by the Checker Framework.

components.name: commons-fileupload2-core
components.description: The Apache Commons FileUpload Core component provides the framework for a simple yet flexible means of adding support for multipart file upload functionality to servlets, portlets, and web applications.
